title: Fancy Trinkets
description: All kinds of helpful baubles (using curios) for various buffs
body: # Fancy Trinkets This mod adds various baubles that are balanced with a more advanced experience based crafting system. This mod is EXTREMELY configurable. There will be full documentation on how to configure this mod on the [McJty wiki](https://www.mcjty.eu/docs/mods/fancy-trinkets/) This mod requires **[Curios](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)**. Some standard trinkets that are included (of course, you can configure many many more): - Regeneration ring - Strength ring - Warp sphere (teleport to what you can see) - Nightvision ring (with a hotkey) - Health trinket (gives + max health and regeneration) - Creative flight trinket - ... ## Modpacks This mod can be used in any modpack ## YouTube video describing the mod:
